name: Quick White Cake
recipeInstructions:
If desired, use plain confectioners' sugar frosting. These cakes may be filled with jelly, preserves, or lemon cornstarch filling.
Preheat the oven to 350°F (moderate). Prepare a 10-inch tube pan or two 8-inch layer pans by greasing lightly with oil or margarine and dusting with flour. Sift together in a mixing bowl the flour, salt, and sugar. Add the oil and 2/3 cup of the milk. Stir until the flour is dampened and beat for 1 minute. Stir in the baking powder and add the remaining 1/2 cup milk, egg whites, and vanilla. Beat for 2 minutes. Pour into the pans and bake for 25-40 minutes.
